title: Triple Bristle™ Toothbrush Travel Case | Portable Breathable Toothbrush Hard Carrying Bag for Traveling, Camping, Business Trip | Mesh Pocket for Accessories | Two Colors Blue and Pink (Pink)
description:
What's worse than losing your luggage? Opening your luggage to find your toothbrush wedged in your shoe and covered in who knows what. Protect your brush from this, get a case.
Features & Benefits
- Compatible with rechargeable & battery-operated toothbrushes*
- Compatible with rechargeable & battery-operated toothbrushes*
- Vibrant blue or pink exterior, embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth
- Vibrant blue or pink exterior, embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth
- Convenient mesh pocket fits additional oral care essentials
- Convenient mesh pocket fits additional oral care essentials
- Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure
- Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure
- Toothbrush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on
- Toothbrush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on
- Removable insert allows for easy cleaning
- Removable insert allows for easy cleaning
- Dimentions - 10" x 1.5" x 2.5"
- Dimentions - 10" x 1.5" x 2.5"
- Shockproof, Stylish, Durable and provides the highest level of protection against elements
- Shockproof, Stylish, Durable and provides the highest level of protection against elements
Good protection for electric toothbrush, Considering the safety of your electric toothbrush, we choose the better material to keep your triple bristle electric sonic toothbrush safe and secure wherever you go.
Meet your needs
In this case, you can carry:
- ONE toothbrush
- ONE toothbrush
- TWO toothbrush heads
- TWO toothbrush heads
- ONE Tongue Cleaner
- ONE Tongue Cleaner
- Mesh pocket for the accessories. Soft lining inside the case for protection.
- Mesh pocket for the accessories. Soft lining inside the case for protection.
- Right size and Right weight allows for easy and convenient portability on the go.
- Right size and Right weight allows for easy and convenient portability on the go.
* NOTE: Travel cases were NOT designed to fit the Triple Bristle Kids toothbrush shape/size, we have one in the making. Stay tuned.
features: ✅ PREMIUM HARD CASE MATERIAL - Made to fit ONLY the Triple Bristle sonic toothbrushes. Compatible with the rechargeable and battery-operated toothbrushes. Our travel case is made with premium materials in a matte texture. Very lightweight which is easy to carry with you anywhere you go. Your brush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on.
✅ KEEP YOUR BRUSH CLEAN AND DRY - Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure. Each toothbrush travel case can hold one toothbrush, extra brush head and tongue cleaner.

✅ PROPERLY DESIGNED PORTABLE & DURABLE - Toothbrush case is convenient to carry, perfect for travel. Take your brush to work, to the gym, in your purse or even in your glove box in the car. Put the toothbrush case in your suitcase or bag. Great for business trips, traveling, school, camping and away from your home.

✅ COMPACT & HYGENIC - Easy to clean and maintain, keeps your toothbrushes clean and dry in a healthy environment. High-quality plastic case, sturdy, slim, and easy to carry. Dust-proof and moisture-proof protects the toothbrush. Save space in your purse, carry-on, or travel toiletry bag. Rounded corner design will not scratch other items in your bag.

✅ SLEEK TOOTHBRUSH CASE – This 10” x 1.5” x 2.5” case comes in two vibrant colors – blue and pink. The case and zipper are embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth to sport the Triple Bristle lifestyle in a sleek and elegant way.
✅ TRIPLE BRISTLE FAMILY OF PRODUCTS - Check out our line of sonic toothbrushes with our patented 3 head brush design for a faster more reliable clean!

✅ A CASE WITH A PURPOSE - It's a toothbrush case with a purpose: to protect your toothbrush from the elements, while letting you take it everywhere you go without worrying about what might happen to it.

reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits
reviews.text: Each year we put together kits for the unhomed.  These work well as they're individually packaged.  Would definitely buy again.  But would appreciate a discount of some kind to help us provide more kits in the future.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

title: Traveling Panda Mini Travel Bamboo Toothbrush Kit with 2 Soft Bristle Toothbrushes and Mint Toothpaste Tablets, 2X 10 Tabs
features: BAMBOO TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH AND TOOTHPASTE TABS - Travel toothbrushes and tabs ready for on the go teeth brushing. Comes in a compact pouch for ease when traveling, perfect travel essentials.
KINDNESS FOR THE PLANET - Move away from plastic and say hello to a bamboo toothbrush. Our bamboo travel toothbrush and packaging is designed with the planet in mind.
MINT TOOTHPASTE TABS - The mint flavored tablet toothpaste is chewable and doesn’t require water. Allowing you to brush your teeth anywhere with your mini bamboo toothbrush

reviews.title: Way too small…
reviews.text: Way smaller than I had hoped for. Tiny toothbrushes the toothbrushes looks like they’ve been cut in half. That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

Doesn't seem nearly as strong as my sonic care.

reviews.title: great for sensitive mouths!
reviews.text: I’m on the autism spectrum and my sensory issues around my mouth are so intense that I have had a lifelong phobia of the dentist. (I still go, I just have a a very anxious time.) my only complaint is that you definitely need the travel case because this thing turns itself on in your bag super easily and sounds like a marital aid. 😳

reviews.title: Unable to Install Batteries, having to return item
reviews.text: I was so excited to get my new toothbrush in the mail today but have been trying for the last 30 minutes to get the thing opened so batteries can be installed & it is next to impossible. It has a “open to install” & close, I have turned it to “open to install” it will not open, have even tried to pry it open with a knife to no avail. Instruction booklet does not touch battery installation. If I could get the batteries in - I’d probably LOVE the toothbrush, as it seems to be well made & comes with a tongue scraper/brush & 2 toothbrush heads. Purchased for autistic grandson who has trouble brushing his teeth, hoping to make things easier for his little life but this mimi is getting extra frustrated with the little “no grip” cap that won’t open for battery installation. Now have to go through the dreaded process of processing a return. On a good note, if you’re purchasing it for someone who is severely disabled - you won’t have to worry about them popping the battery compartment open & choking on the batteries because it “ain’t happening” as we say in the south. ***Update to review. Customer service is awesome. Made 1 phone call & they’ve called me back twice & sending a new system with preinstalled batteries. The one I got, must’ve been a fluke. Now updated to a 5star. Very well made. Has a 2 minute timer on it that can be set for children or someone with intellectual disability so they brush teeth for right amount of time. Nice system & wonderul customer service.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.

TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.
